title: Raw T985 -> CSDO theorem-grade input schema

tensor_triples.description: Rows [alpha,beta,gamma,p_alpha_beta_gamma] for all nonzero A985 structure constants; expected shape [1414965,4].

certification_tests: verify SHA-256 equals d20 core invariant tensor_triples_sha256
aggregate tensor by (source,target) to recover M6 and coefficient masses
project q42 classes onto the four CSDO sign chambers
verify all CSDO chambers fold to a single A12 image
compare two-sided energy in A42/CSDO/A12/Foam16 projections
